race.comment: SOCIABLE (9) slow into stride third-up when he stretched out to the 1300m for a fast finishing third at Warwick Farm. Produced excellent closing splits last start and can finish over the top of these with the fast tempo. Well placed with Grima's claim. PETTICOAT (3) talented mare who gave Ice Kool a real fright last start with a tenacious on-pace second over 1000m at this track. Gets a similar set-up with leading apprentice retaining the ride. PRIMA BELLA (4) won well first-up, then failed to get into the contest when ninth over this track and trip. Since fitted with a 1045m tick over trial here. Will go forward and is proven in all conditions. ZOURIPPER (7) comes back 200m third-up and look for her launching down the outside. POWER OF THE BRAVE (1) tough sprinter who resumes with excellent fresh credentials. Primed with the two trials and the 3kg claimer riding.
